headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -62.9)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 42% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 120 quotes, including 95 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper-middle range historically, well above typical but not at peak levels.

• Fears rebounded significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism improved modestly but remains below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
